title: Board Finance in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger board finance in practice judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Board Finance in Practice is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Board Finance in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good board finance in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Board Finance in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
